name: t2k-core-workspace
description: Open specification and reference developer runtime for governed T2K decision systems.

scripts.pack:core: npm run build --workspace @t2kai/core && npm run pack:check --workspace @t2kai/core && npm run smoke:package --workspace @t2kai/core
scripts.pack:create-t2k: npm run pack:check --workspace create-t2k && npm run smoke:package --workspace create-t2k
scripts.check:postgres: npm run test --workspace @t2kai/core && npm run example:harborlight:lifecycle && npm run example:scaffold
scripts.check: npm run scrub && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run conformance && npm run example:harborlight && npm run example:scaffold && npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high && npm run pack:core && npm run pack:create-t2k
